description_long: This object is a dark, industrial-style bottle with a conical, ribbed lower body and a complex arrangement of pipes and cylindrical attachments at the top. The main body is smooth and tapers upward, while the upper section features three prominent vertical tubes and several curved, interconnected pipes, giving it a mechanical appearance. The surface is glossy and hard, reflecting light in a way that suggests it is made of metal. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements, and the entire object is a uniform dark gray or black color. The bottle appears robust and heavy, with no visible signs of damage or wear. Its design is reminiscent of a high-pressure vessel or a specialized industrial container rather than a typical consumer bottle.
description: A dark, metallic bottle with a ribbed conical base and intricate pipework at the top, featuring a glossy, hard surface and an industrial appearance.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the ribbed conical base and two vertical pipes, with a curved pipe looping around the left side.
description_view_1: This side view shows the largest vertical pipe and the most complex arrangement of curved pipes, emphasizing the mechanical top section.
description_view_2: The front view displays all three vertical pipes clearly, with the central dome and symmetrical pipework most visible.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the rightmost vertical pipe and the looping pipes, with the ribbed base and central dome still prominent.
